# Skill Validation Checklist

Mark each item before requesting merge.

## Structure
- [ ] SKILL.md exists and parses
- [ ] Required frontmatter keys are present
- [ ] Name/path are consistent with directory

## References & Dependencies
- [ ] Relative file references resolve
- [ ] Required dependencies are documented
- [ ] Required env vars are documented

## Safety
- [ ] Non-goals are explicit
- [ ] External side effects are declared
- [ ] Approval expectations are explicit
- [ ] Fallback/degradation behavior is documented

## UX / Documentation
- [ ] Description is clear and specific
- [ ] At least one realistic invocation example
- [ ] Inputs/outputs are documented

## Validation
- [ ] Lint/validation tooling passes locally
- [ ] No known critical issues remain

## Maintainer Review
- [ ] Status tier decision recorded (`community`/`verified`/`featured`)
- [ ] Follow-up issues created for deferred improvements (if any)
